title: taraxacum divulsum
intro: Taraxacum divulsum, also known as the common dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum divulsum lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain high levels of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to act as a diuretic, lowering blood pressure and reducing inflammation, while also supporting liver function and digestion. Taraxacum divulsum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
